alumni.letterContent: Dear donor, I don't know you, but you changed my life. The scholarship that arrived that day wasn't just money — it was proof that someone believed in me. Now I'm an engineer, standing on my own feet, and I support a student every month. Because I know, sometimes all you need is someone to say 'you can do it.'
alumni.letterSignature: A FundEd scholar — the first university graduate in their family

mock.story1: Without FundEd, I couldn't have finished university. My father worked construction, my mother cleaned houses. The day I got the scholarship news, my mom cried on the phone. Now I'm a software engineer at Google and I support a student every month. Because I know that feeling — someone believing in you changes everything.
mock.story2: My family couldn't support me. There was no money for university registration. I was about to give up. FundEd found me and my life changed. Now I'm a hardware engineer at Apple. Every night before sleep I think: what if that scholarship hadn't come?
mock.story3: I was the first girl from my village to go to university. Everyone said 'girls don't need school.' FundEd gave me not just a scholarship, but courage. Now I'm an architect in London and I inspire the girls in my village.
mock.story4: We lost our home in the earthquake. I thought everything was over. But the FundEd community lifted me up. Now I'm a doctor providing volunteer healthcare in earthquake zones. May this cycle never end.
mock.story5: I grew up in an orphanage. Nobody imagined university for me, not even myself. Thanks to FundEd, I studied law. Now I'm a children's rights attorney. In every case, I'm defending that child from the orphanage.
mock.dream2: Make a mark in the tech world

hero.title: A Team Believing in
hero.desc: FundEd was founded to turn the educational dreams of students around the world into reality. We combine transparency, technology, and empathy.

story.title: We Started With
story.quote: Why should a talented student have to quit education just because of financial impossibility?
story.p1: We set out with this question. We saw that more than 244 million children in the world cannot go to school, and hundreds of thousands of university students give up their dreams due to financial problems.
story.p2: FundEd was born as a platform that directly connects donors with students, where every penny is traceable and impact can be measured with concrete data.
story.p3End: While doing this, we put transparency, technology, and human stories at the center.

educationEquality.title: Education Equality
educationEquality.desc: Every student, no matter where they were born, should have unhindered access to education. A child's dreams should not depend on their family's wallet.

transparentFunding.title: Transparent Funding
transparentFunding.desc: Donors should know where every penny goes. Trust is built through openness, not secrecy. Every donation's story should be traceable and accountable.

communityPower.title: Community Power
communityPower.desc: Communities, not individuals alone, create change. When donors, students, mentors, and volunteers come together, nothing is impossible.

digitalAccess.title: Digital Access
digitalAccess.desc: Technology is the key to equal opportunity in education. A student's potential should not depend on whether they have internet access or a computer.

sustainableImpact.desc: We aim for lasting transformation, not short-term aid. Teaching someone to fish rather than giving them a fish — that's the philosophy we pursue.

mentorSupport.title: Mentor Support

globalSolidarity.title: Global Solidarity
globalSolidarity.desc: Borders should not hinder education. A talented student deserves support regardless of where they are in the world. Solidarity knows no geography.

volunteerMovement.title: Volunteer Movement
volunteerMovement.desc: Everyone can be part of the change. An hour of your time, a skill you have, even a smile can make a difference in someone's life.

belief.title: Not Just Help,

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using FundEd, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you may not use our platform.

platform.title: 2. Platform Description
platform.content: FundEd is a crowdfunding platform that connects verified students with donors to support educational needs. We facilitate the connection but are not a party to the funding relationship.

studentResp.title: 3. Student Responsibilities
items: Provide accurate and truthful information in your student profile
Submit legitimate verification documents
Use funds for the stated educational purposes
Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
Maintain the accuracy of campaign information

donorResp.title: 4. Donor Responsibilities
items: Donations are voluntary and non-refundable unless required by law
Donors understand that FundEd is a platform facilitator, not a guarantor
Donors are responsible for their own tax implications

verification.title: 5. Verification Process
verification.content: Student verification is conducted by our admin team. We reserve the right to:
items: Request additional verification documents
Reject verification applications at our discretion
Revoke verification status if information is found to be inaccurate

payment.title: 6. Payment Processing
payment.content: Payments are processed through iyzico. FundEd does not store credit card information. All payment disputes should be directed to iyzico or your financial institution.

prohibited.title: 7. Prohibited Activities
items: Provide false or misleading information
Use the platform for illegal purposes
Impersonate others or misrepresent your identity
Interfere with the platform's operation
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the platform

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: FundEd acts as a platform facilitator. We are not responsible for the accuracy of campaign information, the use of funds by students, or disputes between students and donors.

termination.title: 9. Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or engage in fraudulent activity.

changes.title: 10. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
items: Account information (name, email address) when you sign up
Student profile information (university, field of study, country) for verification
Campaign information (title, description, funding goals)
Payment information processed securely through iyzico
Verification documents submitted for student verification

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use the information we collect to:
items: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
Process and verify student applications
Process donations and payment transactions
Send you transactional emails (verification status, donation confirmations)
Respond to your inquiries and provide customer support
Comply with legal obligations

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:
items: With payment processors (iyzico) to process donations
With service providers who assist in operating our platform
When required by law or to protect our rights
Public campaign information (name, campaign details) as displayed on campaign pages

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
items: Access your personal information
Correct inaccurate information
Request deletion of your account and data
Opt out of non-transactional communications

contact.title: 6. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the support channels provided on the platform.

nature.title: Platform Nature
nature.content: FundEd is a crowdfunding platform that facilitates connections between verified students and donors. We are a technology platform, not a financial institution, charity, or educational institution.

guarantees.title: No Guarantees
items: That campaigns will reach their funding goals
That students will use funds as stated in their campaigns
The accuracy of information provided by students
The success of any educational endeavor

verification.title: Verification Disclaimer
verification.content: While we verify student status through document review, verification does not constitute:
items: Endorsement of the student's campaign
Guarantee of campaign success
Verification of the student's financial need
Assurance of fund usage compliance

risks.title: Donation Risks
items: Donations are voluntary contributions, not purchases
FundEd does not provide refunds except as required by law
Donors are responsible for their own tax reporting
There is no guarantee that campaign goals will be met

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
items: iyzico for payment processing
Cloudinary for file storage
Google OAuth for authentication
thirdParty.disclaimer: We are not responsible for the actions, policies, or services of these third parties.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, FundEd shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the platform.

steps.s3Desc: Collected donations are transferred directly to the student's needs. School supplies, scholarships, or digital tools — every penny reaches its target.
steps.s4Desc: Track the impact of your donation with concrete data and photos. Thank you messages from students, progress reports, and impact analyses on your dashboard.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Your donation is directed to the student you selected. Donations to the general fund are distributed to students with the most urgent needs. Every transaction is recorded and traceable.
faq.a2: Yes! You can donate completely anonymously by leaving the name and email fields blank on the donation form.
faq.a3: Every student application is made with ID, enrollment documents, and a needs statement. Our team verifies all documents and publishes the profile after confirming eligibility.
faq.q4: How can I see the impact of my donation?
faq.a4: After donating, you can track student progress, photos, and impact reports from your personal dashboard.
faq.a5: Yes! With our FundEd Corporate panel, you can donate on behalf of your company, automatically generate ESG reports, and track impact together with your team.
faq.q6: What is the minimum donation amount?
faq.a6: The minimum donation is $1. Every amount makes a difference — even $10 can provide a student with notebooks and pens for a month.

hero.title: A Team That Believes
hero.desc: FundEd was founded to turn the education dreams of students from around the world into reality. We bring together transparency, technology and empathy.

story.title: It Started
story.quote: “Why should a talented student have to drop out of education just because of financial impossibility?”
story.p1: We set out with this question. We saw that over 244 million children worldwide cannot go to school, and hundreds of thousands of university students give up their dreams due to financial problems.
story.p2: FundEd was born as a platform that directly connects donors with students, where every penny is traceable and impact can be measured with concrete data.
story.p3End: In doing so, we put transparency, technology and human stories at the center.
